## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm audit --audit-level=low`
- [ ] `npm pack --dry-run`

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No real tokens, Worker URLs, account IDs, local config, `.env` files, logs, or notebook output are included.
- [ ] Remote-code-execution, auth, file, logging, and setup changes fail closed and include tests.
